narrative:
Franklin City has 7,133 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
